findings.detail: Negative test asserts exit code == 2 (exact _run_json_command rejection code) rather than merely non-zero; stronger than spec minimum.

Executor ran only the first two spec validation commands (user-directed, truthfully documented). Reviewer re-ran the contracted suite (613 passed) and verified zero diff under src/alpha_system/governance/ and evals/canaries/.

mutation_tests.name: A_revert_cli_plumbing_context_without_trial_ledger_path
mutation_tests.expected: both integration tests FAIL with missing_trial_ledger_path rejection

mutation_tests.name: B_fabricated_existing_default_when_flag_omitted
mutation_tests.expected: negative test FAILS, catching the silent-default gate weakening

mutation_tests.name: restoration_byte_identical
mutation_tests.expected: post-mutation git diff sha256 equals baseline; all 4 file sha256s match
mutation_tests.observed: diff sha256 0b08e0de...b89c39 identical; sha256sum -c OK on all 4 files; post-restore sanity 3 passed in 5.49s
